name: @neo-anki/sync-client
description: Offline-first Workspace v4 client for Neo Anki encrypted sync protocol v1.

scripts.prebuild: npm run build -w @neo-anki/compatibility-domain && npm run build -w @neo-anki/sync-protocol
scripts.precheck: npm run build -w @neo-anki/compatibility-domain && npm run build -w @neo-anki/sync-protocol
